overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking through a sunny vineyard path in a mountainous region, which abruptly transitions into a dark, rainy storm. The character holds a magical flame throughout, illuminating the path as the weather shifts dramatically.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunny hillside vineyard path with mountain vista

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through vineyards, holding a magical flame in the right hand

entered.detail: ancient stone structure with rounded arches on the right side of the path
rows of grapevines lining the dirt path on the left
large mountain peaks visible in the distance under blue sky
single deciduous tree with green foliage on the right hillside
white stone castle or city visible in the valley below the mountains
small rustic wooden shed with sloped roof beside the path
narrow brown dirt trail winding through the vineyard

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit dirt path through rolling vineyards, passing ancient stone ruins on the right and approaching a wooden shelter. The landscape features rows of grapevines, a large tree on the hillside, and a distant castle visible in the valley below under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: sudden transition to heavy rain and dark storm clouds with reduced visibility
bright afternoon light fades to near-night darkness illuminated by lightning and magic flame

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through the heavy storm, the magical flame providing the primary light source against the darkness

entered.detail: dark turbulent storm clouds covering the sky with lightning visible
heavy rainfall visible as streaks across the screen
tall evergreen trees appearing on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The weather abruptly shifts to a violent storm with heavy rain and dark skies. Geralt continues walking along the path, his magical flame casting flickering light on the surrounding vineyards as lightning illuminates the distant mountains. The wooden shelter falls behind as pine trees emerge on the left, and the vineyard rows now line the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path that transforms from a serene, sunlit vineyard into a violent, rain-swept storm. It begins with Geralt walking past ancient stone ruins and rows of grapevines under a partly cloudy sky, with a distant castle visible in the valley below. As he approaches a wooden shelter, the weather abruptly shifts, plunging the landscape into darkness and heavy rain. The scene then evolves as the camera moves past the shelter and toward emerging pine trees, while a magical flame casts flickering light across the path. Finally, the vineyard rows line the right side of the trail as flashes of lightning illuminate the distant mountains through the downpour.
